ocr_findings.description: OCR header reads '試験にはつしが出る！' — mascot name 'コシ' misread as 'つし'; recurring low-severity pattern, no content impact.
OCR line 'シーナイエル' appears as a spurious phonetic reading fragment before the CIM acronym expansion — not present in image text. This is a minor insertion likely from ruby/furigana rendering.
Image shows the mascot callout box with bold bullet points; OCR renders them as plain bullet list without bold — cosmetic formatting loss only.
The ライン生産方式とセル生産方式の違い table (4 columns) is correctly reproduced in OCR with matching headers and data rows.

reviewer_notes: Page contains the ライン vs セル生産方式 comparison table, body text about セル生産方式 trend, a 試験ポイント callout box with 4 bullet points, and two もう少し詳しく sections on リーン生産方式 and CIMとFMS. OCR captures all substantive content. The spurious 'シーナイエル' fragment (likely furigana for CIM) is a minor insertion but does not lose or corrupt key content.
